title: No Spore Structures
description: Datapack to disable spore "human-built" structures for modpack makers.
body:
[**SUPPORT DISCORD**](https://discord.gg/jEU5Aw48ua)

Currently, Spore does not have a config to disable its custom structures. This datapack disables all "human-built" structures so that modpack makers can add whatever structures they like without having to match Spore's building style.

**Structures disabled:**
spore:hospital
spore:church
spore:cathedral
spore:lab
spore:mines
spore:iceberg_mines

**Technical Aside**
If you use the /locate command, you'll be able to find the places that Spore structures would have generated if they hadn't been disabled. These places may keep the altered spawns/music added by the structure. If this behavior is noticed, please contact me via my discord and I'll fix it if I can. Thanks in advance for your understanding.
**This should have no effect on the average player's playthrough, so feel free to use it in modpacks.**
